notes: A big one. A new Tools screen collects utilities in one place — kitchen timers, sticky and voice notes, a unit/currency converter, ISS pass times, an aurora outlook, an internet speed test, RTSP cameras, a reading lamp, bedtime stories, and a Wi-Fi intercom to another Portal. The screensaver gains an ambient almanac line, a digital-clock face, a sunrise wake-light, and installable calendar packs (Romanian name-days and Orthodox feasts, Irish holidays, prayer times). Plus hourly chimes with spoken time and quiet hours, a welcome overlay, a back-gesture service, and a tidier settings layout where every feature is reachable from one place.
